overall.description: A cinematic static establishing shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a futuristic harbor waterfront with towering skyscrapers in the background. The scene features industrial dock structures, a prominent red bridge, and atmospheric haze with smoke rising from distant stacks under bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk harbor waterfront with industrial docks

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the harbor and distant city skyline from an elevated position over the water

entered.detail: Dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades, spires, and towering structures forming the city backdrop
Red metal pedestrian bridge or walkway spanning horizontally across the left portion of the frame
Colorful stacked containers and small buildings along the shoreline forming a dense dock area
Multiple tall chimneys emitting white smoke plumes rising among the skyscrapers
Murky green water filling the foreground with gentle ripples reflecting the sunlight

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk harbor under bright midday sun. The camera overlooks murky green waters toward a dense skyline of towering glass skyscrapers. A prominent red bridge structure spans the left side while colorful dock structures line the right shore. Industrial smokestacks emit white plumes into the hazy sky, creating an atmospheric cyberpunk cityscape with no visible movement or activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, panoramic vista of a futuristic harbor that emphasizes the scale and atmospheric haze of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with a wide view of murky green waters, framing a dense skyline of towering glass skyscrapers under the glare of a bright midday sun. The perspective encompasses a prominent red bridge spanning the left side of the frame, while colorful industrial dock structures line the right shore. Finally, the scene settles on the distant horizon where white plumes of smoke rise from industrial stacks, blending into a hazy sky to complete the desolate, high-tech cityscape.
